     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<div>\n",
       "<style scoped>\n",
       "    .dataframe tbody tr th:only-of-type {\n",
       "        vertical-align: middle;\n",
       "    }\n",

       "  <thead>\n",

       "      <th></th>\n",

       "      <td>738.539928</td>\n",
       "      <td>9256.983313</td>\n",
       "      <td>574.058403</td>\n",

       "</table>\n",
       "</div>"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "       Distance from Crusher (km)  Quantity (m³)  Rate per m³ (INR)  \\\n",
       "count                 8390.000000    8390.000000        8390.000000   \n",

       "\n",

    "df.describe()"
   ]
  },

       "(8390, 23)"
      ]

   ]

      "text/plain": [
       "Invoice ID                    0\n",
       "Date                          0\n",
       "Customer Name                 0\n",

       "District                      0\n",

       "Rate per m³ (INR)             0\n",

       "Total cost                    0\n",
       "Total profit                  0\n",

      ]
     },

     "output_type": "execute_result"

    "df.isnull().sum()"
   ]

  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "78527a66-a1f1-4c8d-9ba4-eaf5ad4767e5",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "#### sales by stone type"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 9,
   "id": "1537368c-4179-4f91-9074-65edb15cf899",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "\n",
      "Sales by Stone Type:\n",
      " Product Type\n",
      "6mm Aggregates     5109835.0\n",
      "20mm Aggregates    4687758.0\n",
      "4mm Aggregates     4117514.0\n",
      "10mm Aggregates    3333122.5\n",
      "Dust               2054095.0\n",
      "Name: Total profit, dtype: float64\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "top_stones = df.groupby('Product Type')[\"Total profit\"].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)\n",
    "print(\"\\nSales by Stone Type:\\n\", top_stones)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 10,
   "id": "394c0e68-1d3a-4e11-a330-19440a94eb1b",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "\n",
      "Correlation Matrix:\n",
      "                             Distance from Crusher (km)  Quantity (m³)  \\\n",
      "Distance from Crusher (km)                    1.000000       0.008149   \n",
      "Quantity (m³)                                 0.008149       1.000000   \n",
      "Rate per m³ (INR)                            -0.005776       0.017173   \n",
      "Total Amount (INR)                            0.005571       0.707321   \n",
      "Cost per m³ (INR)                            -0.007700       0.014566   \n",
      "Profit (per m3)                               0.008640       0.024664   \n",
      "GST Amount (INR)                              0.005571       0.707321   \n",
      "Total Transport cost                          0.606453       0.800035   \n",
      "Total Material cost                           0.004103       0.643887   \n",
      "Delivery charges                              1.000000       0.008149   \n",
      "Total cost                                    0.031198       0.707196   \n",

      "Profit (per m3)                     0.395433              0.024795   \n",

      "Total Material cost                 0.991237              0.514446   \n",
      "Delivery charges                    0.005571              0.606453   \n",
      "Total cost                          0.999672              0.581042   \n",
      "Total profit                        0.876620              0.660428   \n",
      "\n",
      "                            Total Material cost  Delivery charges  Total cost  \\\n",

     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "print(\"\\nCorrelation Matrix:\\n\", df.corr(numeric_only=True))\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "b5f04a56-f943-4a30-97bd-8e6fb545f15c",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### string strip "
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 11,
   "id": "727f05ef-8c10-4111-9007-4a03ebf53e21",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "df.columns = df.columns.str.strip()\n",
    "df['Customer Name'] = df['Customer Name'].str.title().str.strip()\n",
    "df['Village'] = df['Village'].str.title().str.strip()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3da6c8fc-3cac-46da-b2b9-be863d0b5f24",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "#### date to date time"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 12,
   "id": "f0ff6647-939e-47b2-ae81-b5cd58ff6f51",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "df['Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Date'])"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "cdd2240d-8743-4995-bfad-cd34fbf57b08",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### renaming columns"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 14,
   "id": "b4783188-6a4c-46bd-a88e-7073937fd1c5",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "df.rename(columns={\n",
    "    'Invoice ID': 'invoice_id',\n",
    "    'Date': 'date',\n",
    "    'Customer Name': 'customer_name',\n",
    "    'Village': 'village',\n",
    "    'Distance from Crusher (km)': 'distance_km',\n",
    "    'District': 'district',\n",
    "    'Product Type': 'product_type',\n",
    "    'Quantity (m³)': 'quantity_m3',\n",
    "    'Rate per m³ (INR)': 'rate_per_m3',\n",
    "    'Total Amount (INR)': 'total_amount',\n",
    "    'Cost per m³ (INR)': 'cost_per_m3',\n",
    "    'Profit (per m3)': 'profit',\n",
    "    'Payment Mode': 'payment_mode',\n",
    "    'Transported To': 'transported_to',\n",
    "    'Truck Number': 'truck_number',\n",
    "    'GST %': 'gst_percentage',\n",
    "    'GST Amount (INR)': 'gst_amount',\n",
    "    'Order Type': 'order_type'\n",
    "}, inplace=True)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "4ff4082b-8aa8-4a4c-9983-06469ece2506",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### creating month_year column"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 15,
   "id": "16e57363-ef5e-47b2-bfe4-874a788a5df5",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "New 'month_year' column created successfully:\n",
      "        date month_year\n",
      "0 2024-08-01    2024-08\n",
      "1 2024-08-01    2024-08\n",
      "2 2024-08-01    2024-08\n",
      "3 2024-08-01    2024-08\n",
      "4 2024-08-01    2024-08\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "df['month_year']= df['date'].dt.to_period('M')\n",
    "print(\"New 'month_year' column created successfully:\")\n",
    "print(df[['date', 'month_year']].head())"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "b73bbb14-3275-4f55-8044-f043f74e8b26",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### EDA"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 16,
   "id": "cf4891a9-cd6a-4191-b72e-44f6b8859e65",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "--- Statistical Summary ---\n",
      "            profit  total_amount  distance_km  quantity_m3\n",
      "count  8390.000000   8390.000000  8390.000000  8390.000000\n",
      "mean    164.481526   9256.983313    17.779619    12.506913\n",
      "std      39.013485   4810.787506     8.634921     4.577554\n",
      "min     100.000000   2000.000000     3.000000     5.000000\n",
      "25%     150.000000   5500.000000    12.000000     9.000000\n",
      "50%     160.000000   8000.000000    16.000000    13.000000\n",
      "75%     200.000000  12000.000000    24.000000    16.000000\n",
      "max     210.000000  21200.000000    35.000000    20.000000\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "\n",
    "print(\"--- Statistical Summary ---\")\n",
    "print(df[['profit', 'total_amount', 'distance_km', 'quantity_m3']].describe())\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 17,
   "id": "9489e784-d4e0-4b6b-a470-3d14adbb1fb9",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stderr",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "C:\\Users\\lvved\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\ipykernel_896\\1861277203.py:5: FutureWarning: \n",
      "\n",
      "Passing `palette` without assigning `hue` is deprecated and will be removed in v0.14.0. Assign the `y` variable to `hue` and set `legend=False` for the same effect.\n",
      "\n",
      "  sns.countplot(data=df, y='district', order=df['district'].value_counts().index, palette='viridis')\n"
     ]
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x500 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import seaborn as sns\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))\n",
    "sns.countplot(data=df, y='district', order=df['district'].value_counts().index, palette='viridis')\n",
    "plt.title('Number of Orders by District')\n",
    "plt.xlabel('Total Number of Orders')\n",
    "plt.ylabel('District')\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 18,
   "id": "88658485-cdcd-4673-86a0-a1eb53b974f7",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stderr",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "C:\\Users\\lvved\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\ipykernel_896\\1012935277.py:2: FutureWarning: \n",
      "\n",
      "Passing `palette` without assigning `hue` is deprecated and will be removed in v0.14.0. Assign the `y` variable to `hue` and set `legend=False` for the same effect.\n",
      "\n",
      "  sns.countplot(data=df, y='product_type', order=df['product_type'].value_counts().index, palette='plasma')\n"
     ]
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1000x600 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
    "sns.countplot(data=df, y='product_type', order=df['product_type'].value_counts().index, palette='plasma')\n",
    "plt.title('Number of Orders by Product Type')\n",
    "plt.xlabel('Total Number of Orders')\n",
    "plt.ylabel('Product Type')\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 19,
   "id": "e0f149eb-24a6-4643-a9b3-5ac6a5913680",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "--- Monthly Performance Summary ---\n",
      "  month_year  total_revenue  total_profit\n",
      "0    2024-08        6815580        121530\n",
      "1    2024-09        6494890        115340\n",
      "2    2024-10        6761230        119720\n",
      "3    2024-11        5721980        102940\n",
      "4    2024-12        6888680        120280\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "monthly_performance = df.groupby('month_year').agg(\n",
    "    total_revenue=('total_amount', 'sum'),\n",
    "    total_profit=('profit', 'sum')\n",
    ").reset_index()\n",
    "print(\"--- Monthly Performance Summary ---\")\n",
    "print(monthly_performance.head())"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 20,
   "id": "b202e723-40fe-446b-84be-ca640bd97755",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1200x600 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "monthly_performance['month_year'] = monthly_performance['month_year'].astype(str)\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))\n",
    "plt.plot(monthly_performance['month_year'], monthly_performance['total_revenue'], marker='o', linestyle='-', label='Total Revenue (INR)')\n",
    "plt.plot(monthly_performance['month_year'], monthly_performance['total_profit'], marker='s', linestyle='--', label='Total Profit (INR)')\n",
    "plt.title('Monthly Revenue and Profit Trend')\n",
    "plt.xlabel('Month')\n",
    "plt.ylabel('Amount (INR)')\n",
    "plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
    "plt.grid(True)\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 21,
   "id": "0265cae4-2672-44ef-b76d-58b8dca5c761",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "sns.boxplot(x=df['quantity_m3'])\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "sns.boxplot(x=df['rate_per_m3'])\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "d79c9e91-aa67-485f-9051-5f4ab7f9cee7",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### NEW CALCULATED OVERALL PROFIT COLUMN"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 31,
   "id": "f05f0e64-f21b-497c-82d2-8d103bc759f5",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "material_profit = df['total_amount'] - df['Total Material cost']\n",
    "delivery_profit = df['Delivery charges'] - df['Total Transport cost']\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "df['total profit'] = material_profit + delivery_profit\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 37,
   "id": "8cd8253d-e141-4bcd-9b98-d2e767030894",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "df.drop(columns=['Total profit'],inplace=True)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 41,
   "id": "6589fd74-c946-4bb3-8762-9eb961301558",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "df.drop(columns=['transported_to', 'truck_number'], inplace=True )"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 43,
   "id": "2666fa67-1f70-4f1f-a61a-69a163e0e8e1",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "df.to_csv(\"cleaned_crusher_data.csv\",index=False)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "id": "1088db88-f7a5-4139-b1a9-b7c785e9e0db",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": []
  }
 ],
